case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. RODNEY PALMER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, RODNEY
